What type of fuel does the engine use?
I prefer it to run on regular unleaded.
What is your desired MSRP range for the Volvo Wagon?
I’m aiming for an MSRP of most $32,850, but I’m willing to compromise on price if the year and fuel type fit perfectly.
What is the desired vehicle size for the Volvo Wagon?
The desired vehicle size is Midsize, though I'm moderately flexible if it still feels roomy.
What is the desired year for the Volvo Wagon?
The desired year for the Volvo Wagon is 2008 or newer.
